# wellplayed_preset_script (Resource)

Manages a WellPlayed preset script: a named Lua script that builds a tournament step rule set, with declared parameters. Backed by the `createPresetScript`, `updatePresetScript`, and `deletePresetScript` mutations.

Each update replaces the script and parameters in place — there is no separate publish/release step. Applying the preset to a tournament step (and validating the resulting rule set) is a runtime concern and is not handled by this resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# A simple single-elimination bracket preset, parameterized by team count and
# match length. The Lua script runs when the preset is applied to a tournament
# step and builds the resulting rule set.
resource "wellplayed_preset_script" "single_elim" {
  name        = "Single Elimination"
  description = "Single-elimination bracket with configurable best-of."

  script = <<-LUA
    local team_count = params.team_count
    local best_of = params.best_of or 1

    add_best_of_series_resolution_rule(best_of)
    add_winner_advances_rule()
    add_loser_eliminated_rule()
  LUA

  parameters = [
    {
      name        = "team_count"
      type        = "INT"
      required    = true
      description = "Number of teams competing in this step."
    },
    {
      name          = "best_of"
      type          = "INT"
      required      = false
      default_value = "1"
      description   = "Number of games per series."
    },
  ]
}

# A preset with no parameters.
resource "wellplayed_preset_script" "promote_winners" {
  name   = "Promote Step Winners"
  script = <<-LUA
    add_promote_step_winners_rule()
  LUA
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Preset name. Unique within the organization.
- `script` (String) Lua source that builds a complete step rule set when the preset is applied.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Optional description of the preset.
- `parameters` (Attributes List) Parameters declared by the preset. Values are supplied at apply time. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--parameters))

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) When the preset was created (RFC 3339).
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the preset script.
- `updated_at` (String) When the preset was last updated (RFC 3339).

<a id="nestedatt--parameters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `parameters`

Required:

- `name` (String) Parameter name. Unique within the preset.
- `required` (Boolean) Whether a value must be supplied when applying the preset.
- `type` (String) Primitive parameter type. One of `INT`, `FLOAT`, `STRING`, `BOOLEAN`.

Optional:

- `default_value` (String) Default value used when the parameter is optional, serialized as a string.
- `description` (String) Optional human-readable description of the parameter.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Preset scripts are imported by their ID.
terraform import wellplayed_preset_script.single_elim preset_01h...
```
